title: kyaLabs Agent Identity Extension
description: UCP extension schema for io.kyalabs.common.identity. Defines the payload an agent includes in the checkout request under the 'io.kyalabs.common.identity' key.

token.description: ES256-signed JWT issued by kyaLabs. Obtain via device auth flow (POST /api/oauth/device/authorize) or API key (POST /api/agent-identity). Verify locally against JWKS at kyalabs.io/.well-known/ucp. See reference/verify.ts for the verification algorithm.

kid.description: Key ID matching kyaLabs JWKS at /.well-known/jwks.json. Optional — can be extracted from the JWT header.
